title: Classic Improvements ADD-ON 4 Hybrid ores
description: This mix's the ores with some of the very old ore textures that was used in earlier versions of CIMS
body:
# Classic Improvements Add-on 4 Hybrid Ores

### If your looking for [Classic improvements here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classicimprovements)!

This add multiple ore variations so there 3 type of ores for most ores

There's 

+ Coal

+ Iron

+ gold

+ Redstone

Deepslate variants are out now!

## NOTES

**THIS IS FOR PROGRAMMER ART**

Sorry If the updates are slow 
got to work on getting more textures for [CIMS BOP](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classic-improvements-(biomes-o-plenty))

Optifine is not required at all!

## DOWNLOADS 

[Classic Improvements](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classicimprovements)
